title: limonium hyblaeum
intro: Limonium hyblaeum, also known as the sea lavender or dyer's spurge, is a plant species in the plumbaginaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. In herbal preparations, Limonium hyblaeum is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal properties, and its dried flowers can be used as a natural dye.
